mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_pay_config (config_name, config_code, pay_channel, mch_id, app_id, notify_url, status, sort, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{configName}, #{configCode}, #{payChannel}, #{mchId}, #{appId}, #{notifyUrl}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update ai_c_pay_config set config_name = #{configName}, config_code = #{configCode}, pay_channel = #{payChannel}, mch_id = #{mchId}, app_id = #{appId}, notify_url = #{notifyUrl}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where pay_config_id = #{payConfigId}
